  <script src="/static/js/jquery-3.6.0.min.js"></script>
  <script src="/static/js/bootstrap/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
  
  <script>
    $('#features input').prop('checked', false);
    $('#versions input').prop('checked', false);
  </script>
  <script>
    function prevPage(obj) {
      changePage(-1);
    }
    function nextPage(obj) {
      changePage(+1);
    }

    function getFilters() {
      return {
        "features": $('#features input:checked').map(function() { return this.id.split('-')[1] }).toArray(),
        "versions": $('#versions input:checked').map(function() { return this.id.split('-')[1] }).toArray()
      }
    }
    function changePage(diff = 0) {
      newPage = parseInt($('#currentPage').text()) + diff;
      if (newPage < 1 || (diff > 0 && $('#liste table tbody tr').length < 15))
        return;
      $('#btn-prev').prop("disabled", newPage == 1);
      $("*").addClass('cursor-loading');
      $.ajax({
        type: "GET",
        url: 'liste-rerender',
        data: { 'page': newPage, 'filter': JSON.stringify(getFilters()), 'search': $('#suche input').val() }
      }).done(function(response) {
        $('#liste').html(response);
        $('#currentPage').text(newPage);
        window.history.pushState({}, null, '/' + newPage);
        $("*").removeClass('cursor-loading');
        $('#btn-next').prop("disabled", $('#liste table tbody tr').length < 15);
      });
    }
    function checkVersions(element) {
      id = $(element).attr('id');
      checked = $(element).prop('checked');
      $('#versions input').each(function(e) {
        e = $(this);
        eid = e.attr('id');
        if (id != eid && eid.startsWith(id))
          e.prop('checked', checked);
      });
    }
  </script>

  <script>
    function popupCenter(url, title, w, h) {
      var dualScreenLeft =
        window.screenLeft != undefined ? window.screenLeft : screen.left;
      var dualScreenTop =
        window.screenTop != undefined ? window.screenTop : screen.top;
      width = window.innerWidth
        ? window.innerWidth
        : document.documentElement.clientWidth
          ? document.documentElement.clientWidth
          : screen.width;
      height = window.innerHeight
        ? window.innerHeight
        : document.documentElement.clientHeight
          ? document.documentElement.clientHeight
          : screen.height;
      var left = width / 2 - w / 2 + dualScreenLeft;
      var top = height / 2 - h / 2 + dualScreenTop;
      var newWindow = window.open(
        url,
        title,
        "scrollbars=yes, width=" +
        w +
        ", height=" +
        h +
        ", top=" +
        top +
        ", left=" +
        left
      );
      if (window.focus) {
        newWindow.focus();
      }
    }
  </script>
</body>

</html>
